mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_notice_cache ( notice_id, title, region_name, notice_type, detail_type, status, notice_date, close_date, detail_url, ccr_cnnt_sys_ds_cd, upp_ais_tp_cd, ais_tp_cd, spl_inf_tp_cd, source, cached_at ) VALUES ( #{noticeId}, #{title}, #{regionName}, #{noticeType}, #{detailType}, #{status}, #{noticeDate}, #{closeDate}, #{detailUrl}, #{ccrCnntSysDsCd}, #{uppAisTpCd}, #{aisTpCd}, #{splInfTpCd}, #{source}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), region_name = VALUES(region_name), notice_type = VALUES(notice_type), detail_type = VALUES(detail_type), status = VALUES(status), notice_date = VALUES(notice_date), close_date = VALUES(close_date), detail_url = VALUES(detail_url), ccr_cnnt_sys_ds_cd = VALUES(ccr_cnnt_sys_ds_cd), upp_ais_tp_cd = VALUES(upp_ais_tp_cd), ais_tp_cd = VALUES(ais_tp_cd), spl_inf_tp_cd = VALUES(spl_inf_tp_cd), source = VALUES(source), cached_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rental_notice_cache ORDER BY cached_at DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT contract_address, contract_detail_address, apply_start_date, apply_end_date, contact FROM lh_notice_details WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
SELECT `usage`, address, area, expected_amount, house_type, household_count FROM lh_notice_supplies WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} ORDER BY supply_id ASC
